valueProps.headline: One Platform,
valueProps.description: Monetization for creators. Trust-based discovery for brands. Events and sponsorships for community growth — all in one platform.
valueProps.startFastDesc: Create your creator storefront, sell products, accept bookings, and turn followers into direct revenue — all from one link.
valueProps.earnIncomeDesc: Verified profiles, audience quality checks, and trust signals help brands find you. No more cold DMs or spreadsheets.
valueProps.workWithBrandsDesc: Host meetups, find sponsors, invite creators, and grow your community through real-world and online events.

footer.tagline: The creator business platform — monetize, get discovered, and connect. Launching July 2026.

hero.subheadline: Creators need one place to earn. Brands need one place to discover talent. Organizers need one place for events. ProVibe brings it all together.

forEveryCreator.headline: For Every
forEveryCreator.description: Whether you're a micro creator or a growing brand — ProVibe adapts to how you create and earn.

problemStatement.headline: Scattered Tools,
problemStatement.description: Creators in India have audiences, but still struggle to convert attention into predictable revenue. Brands can't find trustworthy talent. Event organizers manage everything manually.
problemStatement.solutionDesc: ProVibe is a creator business platform — profile page, store, bookings, analytics, brand deals, and events in one place. Launching July 2026.

features.headline: Everything to Earn From
features.bioLinksDesc: Your complete creator storefront — promo content, products, bookings, and lead capture in one place. Designed to convert followers into paying customers.
features.analyticsDesc: Track page views, clicks, product sales, booking conversions, and revenue — all in one real-time dashboard.
features.leadCaptureDesc: Capture emails and phone numbers from your audience. Build a direct subscriber list you own, not rented from platforms.
features.brandDealsDesc: Manage collaborations, negotiate deliverables, and track payment milestones — all from your ProVibe dashboard.
features.campaignsDesc: Add promotional blocks, featured products, and affiliate content to your page. Drive action, not just clicks.
features.digitalStoreDesc: Sell digital and physical products, offer paid sessions and bookings, and accept payments — built directly into your page.

howItWorks.headline: Launch in
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up, pick a template, add your details, media, promo blocks, and products. Your storefront is live in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: List products, offer paid sessions, enable bookings, and set up payments — start earning from day one.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Share your page link, track analytics, capture leads, and receive brand collaboration requests as your audience grows.

roadmap.headline: What's
roadmap.phase1Desc: Creator storefront, promotional content, product selling, paid sessions & bookings, lead capture, simple analytics, and basic payment tracking.
roadmap.phase2Desc: Creator search with advanced filters, verification badges, fake-follower risk scoring, audience insights, campaign inbox, and collaboration management.
roadmap.phase3Desc: Event hosting, creator invitations, sponsor discovery, event promotion, RSVP tracking, and event-based brand partnerships.

foundersNote.messageLine1: Creators in India have audiences — but they still struggle to convert attention into predictable revenue. They juggle profile tools, separate storefronts, email platforms, spreadsheets for brand deals, and manual outreach. It's exhausting and it doesn't scale.
foundersNote.messageLine2: ProVibe started with a simple idea: what if creators had one place to run their entire business? A creator storefront that's a complete business layer — products, bookings, analytics, brand deals, and eventually events and discovery, all in one platform.
foundersNote.messageLine3: We're not live yet. We're building this in the open, starting with creator monetization first — because that gives creators an immediate reason to use ProVibe. If this resonates, join the waitlist. Your feedback will shape what we build.
foundersNote.name: Prem Chand Saini

faq.headline: Questions?
faq.a1: ProVibe is an all-in-one creator business platform. It helps creators earn from their audience through a creator storefront with products, bookings, and promo content. It helps brands discover verified talent with trust-based filtering. And it helps event organizers connect with creators and sponsors.
faq.a2: ProVibe's Phase 1 (creator monetization) launches in July 2026. Join the waitlist now to get early access and be among the first creators on the platform.
faq.q3: Is it free to join the waitlist?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Joining the waitlist is completely free. We'll notify you as soon as we launch so you can be first in line.
faq.q4: What features will be available at launch?
faq.a4: At launch you'll get a public creator storefront, promotional content blocks, product selling, paid sessions and bookings, lead capture, simple analytics, and basic order and payment tracking.
faq.q5: How is ProVibe different from Linktree or other profile tools?
faq.a5: ProVibe is not a simple profile tool — it's a creator business platform. Your storefront isn't just links; it's a creator hub with products, bookings, analytics, lead capture, and brand collaboration tools. Plus, Phase 2 adds brand discovery with verification and trust scoring, and Phase 3 adds events and meetups. No profile tool does that.
faq.q6: Will there be a free plan?
faq.a6: Yes! ProVibe will offer a generous free plan that includes a customizable creator storefront, basic analytics, and essential monetization tools. Premium plans will unlock advanced features like detailed analytics, priority brand matching, and more.
faq.a7: In Phase 2, brands will be able to search creators by category, language, followers, niche, and location. They'll see trust signals like verification badges, follower quality scores, and engagement analysis. Creators can browse opportunities, apply to campaigns, and manage collaborations directly through ProVibe.
faq.q8: Can I sell products and bookings on ProVibe?
faq.a8: Yes! You can sell digital products (ebooks, courses, templates, presets), physical products, and offer paid sessions, consultations, coaching, and bookings — all from your ProVibe page with built-in payments.

cta.headline: Zero Fees for
cta.subtitle: Join now and sell with 0% commission and 0% processing fees when we launch. This offer is only for early waitlist members.
cta.tagline: Free to join • No credit card required • Launch July 2026

creators.headline: Your Page. Your Store.
creators.subheadline: Your complete creator storefront — sell products, accept bookings, capture leads, manage brand deals, and turn followers into revenue from one page.
creators.bioBuilderDesc: Drag-and-drop blocks for promo content, products, bookings, links, media, and embeds. Fully customizable creator storefront templates designed to convert.
creators.leadGenDesc: Capture emails and phone numbers, broadcast campaigns to your subscriber list, and build a direct audience you own.
creators.templatesDesc: Choose from professionally designed templates and make them yours in minutes.
creators.faqQ1: How quickly can I set up my page?
creators.faqA1: Most creators have their creator storefront live in under 3 minutes. Pick a template, add your content, products, and bookings — and you're ready to share.
creators.faqQ2: Can I use my own domain?
creators.faqA2: Yes! You can connect your custom domain or use a free provibe.com/yourname subdomain.
creators.faqQ3: What can I sell on ProVibe?
creators.faqA3: Digital products (ebooks, courses, templates, presets), physical products, paid sessions, coaching, consultations, bookings, and subscription content.
creators.faqA4: We integrate with major payment processors. You receive payouts directly to your bank account with transparent fee structures.
creators.ctaSubtitle: Be among the first creators on ProVibe. Join the waitlist and get early access when we launch in July 2026.
creators.affiliateManagementDesc: Track affiliate links, monitor commissions, and measure performance across all your partnerships.
creators.analyticsDashboardDesc: Track page views, clicks, product sales, booking conversions, revenue, and audience growth with real-time dashboards.
creators.digitalStorefrontDesc: Sell digital and physical products, offer paid sessions and bookings, manage orders — all with built-in payments on your page.

brands.headline: Discover Verified
brands.subheadline: A trust-based discovery platform for brands — search creators, check audience quality, filter by niche and location, and run campaigns. Launching after creator tools go live.
brands.forBrandsDesc: Discover creators, check trust signals, run campaigns, and manage collaborations — all from one dashboard.
brands.creatorDiscoveryDesc: Search and filter creators by category, language, city, follower count, niche, audience type, and engagement quality.
brands.roiAnalyticsDesc: See follower trends, engagement quality, audience demographics, and fake-follower risk indicators before you commit.
brands.forCreatorsDesc: Get discovered by brands looking for authentic, verified talent in your niche.
brands.opportunityFeedDesc: Receive brand campaign invitations, collaboration offers, and partnership requests — all in one feed.
brands.applyTrackDesc: Apply to campaigns, negotiate deliverables, track milestones, and manage brand partnerships without leaving ProVibe.
brands.eventsDesc: A platform for creator meetups, brand events, sponsor matching, and community-driven growth.
brands.exploreEventsDesc: Find meetups, workshops, and creator events by location, category, and niche. Discover what's happening in your creator community.
brands.eventDetailsDesc: Invite creators to your event, manage RSVPs, track attendance, and coordinate promotion commitments.
brands.createHostDesc: Create events, find brand sponsors and partners, invite creators for attendance and promotion, and manage creator-driven event growth.
brands.eventAnalyticsDesc: Connect brands with events for sponsorships, run creator-driven promotions, and track partnership outcomes.
brands.communityEcosystemDesc: Creators earn, brands discover, organizers connect — one shared data layer with different experiences for each side.
brands.offlineOnlineDesc: Verification badges, audience quality checks, and fake-follower risk scoring help brands find authentic creators they can trust.
brands.revenueStreamsDesc: Events, brand deals, and meetups create a network where creators, brands, and organizers all benefit from being on the same platform.
brands.ctaSubtitle: Brand discovery and events platform launching after our creator monetization tools. Get notified when it's ready.
brands.campaignManagerDesc: Post campaign requirements, set budgets, define deliverables, collect responses and leads from creators, and manage influencer campaigns end-to-end.
brands.directMessagingDesc: Communicate with creators, share briefs, approve content, and manage deliverables in-platform.

about.subheadline: ProVibe is a creator business platform — not a simple profile tool. It's the complete business layer for creators to earn, brands to discover, and organizers to connect.
about.missionText: Creators in India face inconsistent income, scattered tools, and platform dependency. They have audiences but struggle to convert attention into predictable revenue. Brands face fragmented discovery and fake-follower risk. Event organizers manage everything manually. ProVibe exists to solve all three problems in one platform — starting with creator monetization, then brand discovery, then events.
about.phase1Desc: Creator storefront, products, bookings, promo content, lead capture, analytics, and payment tracking.
about.phase2Desc: Creator search, advanced filters, verification, fake-follower scoring, audience insights, campaign management.
about.phase3Desc: Event hosting, creator invitations, sponsor discovery, event promotion, and community growth.
about.team1Bio: Building ProVibe to give every creator a complete business layer — not just links, but products, bookings, brand deals, and events in one platform. Starting with micro and nano creators in India.
about.ctaSubtitle: Help shape the creator business platform that's starting with monetization, adding brand discovery, and building toward events and community growth.
about.value1Desc: Every decision starts with: how does this help creators turn their audience into predictable revenue?
about.value2Desc: Verification, audience quality checks, and fake-follower scoring — trust is the foundation of every brand-creator relationship.
about.value3Desc: We build in focused phases. Creator monetization first, brand discovery second, events third. One strong wedge at a time.
about.value4Desc: From tool to ecosystem — events, meetups, and partnerships create a network where everyone grows together.
